content:
## MARKET OVERVIEW

**1. What is the Current Market Regime?**
RISK-ON: Normal volatility 34.8% with broad participation (Breadth 6/8). Market favors cyclicals and banks over energy and tech.

**2. Which sectors are leading?**
Banking & Finance ABOVE TREND: AKBNK (1W: +12.56% | 1M: +1.47%) and YKBNK (1W: +13.39% | 1M: +1.76%); Transportation ABOVE TREND: TAVHL (1W: +6.80% | 1M: +4.17%); Construction & REIT ABOVE TREND: ALARK (1W: +8.63% | 1M: +6.57%).

**3. Which sectors are lagging?**
Energy & Chemicals BELOW TREND: TUPRS (1W: -2.91% | 1M: -6.76%) and PETKM (1W: -6.96% | 1M: -26.89%); Technology & Telecom BELOW TREND: KONTR (1W: -10.65% | 1M: -33.94%).

## STOCK PERFORMANCE

**4. Top Performing Stocks?**
YKBNK (1W: +13.39% | 1M: +1.76%) ABOVE TREND; AKBNK (1W: +12.56% | 1M: +1.47%) ABOVE TREND; GARAN (1W: +8.72% | 1M: +3.35%) ABOVE TREND; ALARK (1W: +8.63% | 1M: +6.57%) ABOVE TREND; ISCTR (1W: +8.49% | 1M: +1.42%) ABOVE TREND.

**5. Worst Performing Stocks?**
KONTR (1W: -10.65% | 1M: -33.94%) BELOW TREND; PETKM (1W: -6.96% | 1M: -26.89%) BELOW TREND; HEKTS (1W: -6.04% | 1M: -15.07%) BELOW TREND; TRMET (1W: -5.59% | 1M: -15.82%) BELOW TREND; VESTL (1W: -4.23% | 1M: -15.83%) BELOW TREND.

**6. Momentum Stocks?**
YKBNK (1W: +13.39% | 1M: +1.76%) ABOVE TREND; AKBNK (1W: +12.56% | 1M: +1.47%) ABOVE TREND; GARAN (1W: +8.72% | 1M: +3.35%) ABOVE TREND; KONTR (1W: -10.65% | 1M: -33.94%) BELOW TREND; PETKM (1W: -6.96% | 1M: -26.89%) BELOW TREND.

## SECTOR OUTLOOK

**7. Banking Sector Outlook?**
Banking is leading and confirmations are strong: AKBNK (1W: +12.56% | 1M: +1.47%) ABOVE TREND, GARAN (1W: +8.72% | 1M: +3.35%) ABOVE TREND, ISCTR (1W: +8.49% | 1M: +1.42%) ABOVE TREND, YKBNK (1W: +13.39% | 1M: +1.76%) ABOVE TREND — momentum favors overweight exposure.

**8. Industrial Sector Outlook?**
Heavy industry mixed: EREGL (1W: +0.51% | 1M: -1.49%) RECOVERY, FROTO (1W: +0.58% | 1M: -7.22%) RECOVERY, ASELS (1W: +2.27% | 1M: -10.05%) RECOVERY, ARCLK (1W: -0.39% | 1M: -9.26%) BELOW TREND — selective stock picking advised.

**9. Energy & Chemicals Outlook?**
Sector is weak and under pressure: TUPRS (1W: -2.91% | 1M: -6.76%) BELOW TREND, PETKM (1W: -6.96% | 1M: -26.89%) BELOW TREND, SASA (1W: +4.42% | 1M: -10.65%) RECOVERY — avoid broad exposure, pick rebounds only.

## PORTFOLIO STRATEGY

**10. Portfolio Recommendation?**
Risk-on stance: overweight Banking & Transportation, tactical overweight Construction/REITs; underweight Energy and weak Tech names. Trim positions in prolonged losers and allocate incremental risk to high-momentum bank names.

## NEXT WEEK OUTLOOK

**11. Stocks to Watch Next Week?**
AKBNK (1W: +12.56% | 1M: +1.47%) ABOVE TREND; YKBNK (1W: +13.39% | 1M: +1.76%) ABOVE TREND; ALARK (1W: +8.63% | 1M: +6.57%) ABOVE TREND; TAVHL (1W: +6.80% | 1M: +4.17%) ABOVE TREND; KONTR (1W: -10.65% | 1M: -33.94%) BELOW TREND for volatility-driven setups.

**12. Sectors to Watch Next Week?**
Banking & Finance, Transportation, Construction & REIT — these sectors will likely lead if macro tailwinds persist.

**13. Key Levels & Triggers?**
Watch XU100 behavior around the short-term resistance/breakout and 20-day trend; monitor domestic macro (inflation, CBRT commentary), USD/TRY moves and global rate cues as triggers for rotation into cyclicals.

## EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
RISK-ON regime with normal volatility and 6/8 sector breadth—banks and transport lead while energy and tech lag. Favor overweight in high-momentum banks and selective construction names, stay defensive in energy and deep-value tech until trend confirmation.
